chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 171 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 27-09-2022 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General Sindh and Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
